MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-20-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jonathan Fried, Esq. Attorney at law (415-986-7000) for Place of Franks, LLC Defendant and moving party.
Peter Ryan, Esq. of Fox, Rothschild, LLP (415-781-4400) for City Life Properties, LLC Plaintiff and opposing party.

After hearing argument from Defense's counsel the Court rules as follows; DEFENDANT PLACE OF FRANK'S LLC'S MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is GRANTED. No other pleadings can be filed until determination is reached as to who is the proper counsel for Defendant Place of Frank's LLC, et al. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk B. Paredes, Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Mar-20-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jonathan Fried, Esq. Attorney at law (415-986-7000) for Place of Franks, LLC Defendant and moving party.
Peter Ryan, Esq. of Fox, Rothschild, LLP (415-781-4400) for City Life Properties, LLC Plaintiff and opposing party.

After hearing argument from Defense's counsel the Court rules as follows; DEFENDANT PLACE OF FRANK'S LLC's Motion To Compel Arbitration is DENIED without Prejudice. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk B. Paredes, Not Reported. (501)

Ntc Of Mtn And Application To Expunge Lis Pendens
Off Calendar Dec-04-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jonathan Fried, Esq., of Fried Law (415-986-7000) for Place of Frank's LLC, Defendant and moving party.
Dwight Donovan, Esq., of MBV Law, LLP (415-781-4400) for City Life Properties, LLC, Plaintiff and opposing party.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: DEFENDANT PLACE OF FRANK'S LLC Notice Of Motion And Application To Expunge Lis Pendens is taken under submission. Proposed orders are submitted. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

at 11:40 am, DEFENDANT PLACE OF FRANK'S LLC Notice Of Motion And Application To Expunge Lis Pendens is Denied. Plaintiff's request for attorney's fees in the amount of $5,075 is granted. Order is signed and filed. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)(see scanned order for details)
